base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of goomba_squashed — a effect_layer from 1985 super mario bros. Squashed state — goomba flattened to 8px tall. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Squashed state — goomba flattened to 8px tall; plays briefly at stomp moment before despawn
